name: use-poll
description: Re-run an async fetcher on an interval and get a typed AsyncState<T> back — for dashboards and statuses that refresh on their own. Only the first load shows loading; later polls refresh in the background without flashing a spinner.

intents: poll an endpoint on an interval and keep the UI in sync
refresh a dashboard or queue automatically without a loading flash
re-fetch data every few seconds with pause and resume
examples:
const jobs = usePoll(() => api.jobs.list(), [], { interval: 3000 });
<DataList state={jobs.state} label="Jobs" getKey={(j) => j.id}>{(j) => <JobRow job={j} />}</DataList>
